mapper.select:
SELECT id, username, email, age, create_time, update_time, version, deleted FROM sys_user WHERE deleted = 0
AND username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{username}, '%')
ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.email, u.age, u.create_time, u.update_time, u.version, u.deleted, r.id AS role_id, r.role_name, r.role_code, r.description AS role_description, r.create_time AS role_create_time, r.update_time AS role_update_time, r.deleted AS role_deleted FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON u.id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE u.deleted = 0 ORDER BY u.create_time DESC

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.email, u.age, u.create_time, u.update_time, u.version, u.deleted, r.id AS role_id, r.role_name, r.role_code, r.description AS role_description, r.create_time AS role_create_time, r.update_time AS role_update_time, r.deleted AS role_deleted FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON u.id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE u.deleted = 0 AND u.id = #{id}
